needed_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: Finset.card_univ.{u_1} {α : Type u_1} [Fintype α] [DecidableEq α] : (univ : Finset α).card = Fintype.card α
needed_mathlib_context.why_needed: To rewrite `(univ : Finset (Fin N)).card` to `Fintype.card (Fin N)` in the proof, replacing the incorrect `Finset.card_fintype`.
